docs.title: Architecture
docs.text:
• src/petstore_mcp: MCP server, tools, resources, client, and schemas.
  • tests/petstore_mcp: mirrored tests for each module.
  • .github/workflows: CI, release, and docs workflows.

docs.title: Configuration
docs.text: Environment variables are loaded through pydantic-settings and .env during local development.

docs.title: Deployment Guide
docs.text:
• CI validates lint and tests.
  • Tag v*.*.* to trigger package release workflow.
  • Docs are deployed to GitHub Pages via workflow.

docs.title: Development Guide
docs.text:
• uv sync --dev
  • uv run ruff check .
  • uv run ruff format .
  • uv run pytest

docs.title: Overview
docs.text: petstore-mcp is a production-ready Python MCP server scaffold for the Petstore API.

docs.title: Resources
docs.text: Resources include cached health data, pagination, and streaming-style pet pages.

docs.title: Tools
docs.text: The server auto-registers MCP tools from petstore_mcp.tools with Pydantic input/output models.
